mapper.insert:
SELECT approvalTemplate_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO approvalTemplate (tempId, tempName, writerEmpId, regDate) VALUES (#{tempId}, #{tempName}, #{writerEmpId}, SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO approvalTemplateLine (tempLineId, tempId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode) VALUES (approvalTemplateLine_seq.NEXTVAL, #{tempId}, #{stepOrder}, #{apprEmpId}, #{apprEmpName}, #{apprDeptCode}, #{apprDeptName}, #{apprGradeCode}, #{apprGradeName}, 'APPROVER')
mapper.select: SELECT tempId, tempName, writerEmpId, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM approvalTemplate WHERE writerEmpId = #{writerEmpId} ORDER BY regDate DESC

SELECT tempLineId, tempId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode FROM approvalTemplateLine WHERE tempId = #{tempId} ORDER BY stepOrder
